base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pipe_horizontal_green — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Horizontal pipe variant — cap + body rotated 90°. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Horizontal pipe variant — cap + body rotated 90°; appears in world 4-2 / 8-4 secret pipes and bonus-room entries
